kick_title: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W6 — axiom shared-file refactor (cycle 8 fan-out 3/5)

architecture_decision.mission_step1_intent: Foundation/Axioms.lean shared file — single source of truth for 7 named axioms; F-W5-AX2-1 falsifier resolution
architecture_decision.obstacle: naive single-file Foundation/Axioms cannot be a leaf because axiom signatures reference Strand (pre-W6 in AX2.lean) and IsMKProperClass (pre-W6 in AX2.lean). Cyclic-dep avoidance forced AX2 mirror axioms in cycle 7 W5.

options_evaluated.rationale: AX2 cannot then import Foundation/Axioms (cycle); mirror axioms remain
Foundation/Strand.lean (leaf) + Foundation/Axioms.lean (imports Strand). Both AX2 and MKBridge import both. Clean DAG; mirrors collapse.
would conflate Strand inductive (lightweight) with axiom layer (heavy ZFC + NumberTheory imports); harms compile-time and audit clarity

architecture_decision.selection_rationale: Foundation/Strand.lean is a true leaf (only Mathlib.Data.Set.Basic). Foundation/Axioms.lean imports Strand + heavy mathlib (ZFC, NumberTheory). DAG: Strand ← Axioms ← {AX1, AX2, MKBridge}. AX2 mirrors collapsed to Strand-form theorems.

new_files.purpose: leaf module: Strand inductive + alphabets + predicates + opaque MK class predicates
single-source axioms (5 unique, post-mirror-collapse) + AX1Eq + StrandClass_ZFC + bridge theorems

modified_files.change: removed AX1Eq local def + axiom_robin_hardy_wright_ax1_tail; replaced with import N6.MechVerif.Foundation.Axioms
removed Strand inductive + alphabets + predicates + 2 mirror axioms + opaque preds; replaced with import N6.MechVerif.Foundation.{Strand,Axioms}
removed 4 axioms + StrandClass_ZFC def + zfc_plus_inaccessible_witness; replaced with import N6.MechVerif.Foundation.{Strand,Axioms}

deliverables.axiom_delta_explanation: Net axiom keyword count UNCHANGED at 7; refactor effects: (a) 2 AX2 mirrors ELIMINATED (-2), (b) concurrent cycle-8 fan-out 2/5 split axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta into 3 step sub-axioms (+2 net), giving net 0. F-W5-AX2-1 still RESOLVED because the SOURCE OF DUPLICATION is gone (mirrors removed); the +2 from Felgner decomposition is an INCREASE in PRECISION (better citation/audit), not a regression.
axiom_names_removed_w6_fanout2_absorbed: axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta (now derived theorem; same name preserved for downstream callers)

axiom_inventory_post_w6.name: axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta
axiom_inventory_post_w6.purpose: (post cycle-8 fan-out 2/5) now derived theorem from 3 step sub-axioms; counted as 3 unique step axioms (step1/step2/step3) all : True; same logical content as prior single axiom

AX2_strand_is_MK_class.remark: axiom dependency expanded but no new axioms introduced; aligned with MKBridge.AX2_strand_is_MK_class_via_ZFC

f_w5_ax2_1_resolution.falsifier_claim: Reviewer rejects local axiom mirroring (`*_AX2` suffix axioms in AX2.lean) as duplication; demands shared-file refactor canonicalising axioms in MKBridge
f_w5_ax2_1_resolution.resolution_method: Foundation/Axioms.lean shared-file refactor (option (a) from F-W5-AX2-1 mitigation plan; cycle 8 fan-out 3/5)
f_w5_ax2_1_resolution.evidence: AX2.lean axiom count: 2 → 0; MKBridge.lean axiom count: 4 → 0; all axioms relocated to Foundation/Axioms.lean; mirror axioms (`*_AX2`) removed; lake build PASS; sorry count remains 0

f_d_3_reassessment.rationale: Architectural-debt elimination: 2 mirror axioms removed; single source of truth for the 5 unique axioms simplifies future discharge work. F-W5-AX2-1 RESOLVED. Remaining gates (Encodable derivation, HEXA-COMP definition, Felgner full mechanisation) unchanged in difficulty; no new risk surface introduced.
f_d_3_reassessment.highest_risk_gate_now: W6 HEXA-COMP definition (AX-3/AX-4 boundary; F-W5-AX2-3 carries forward)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: Reviewer questions Foundation namespace choice — alternative names (Common, Core, Shared, Base) may be preferred over Foundation
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by W11-W12 review (2026-07-15 to 2026-07-28), reviewer requests namespace rename
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: track maintainer disposition on Foundation namespace; record requested rename if any
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may FIRE at LOW severity — Foundation matches mathlib4 convention (e.g. Mathlib.Init, Mathlib.Logic.Basic); rename is sed-trivial

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: AX1Eq relocation to Foundation/Axioms.lean introduces unnecessary heavy-mathlib pull (NumberTheory) into a file otherwise focused on ZFC/MK; reviewer prefers AX1Eq stays in AX1.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by W11-W12 review, reviewer flags split-by-axis preference (number-theoretic vs set-theoretic axioms in separate files)
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: track reviewer disposition; prepare option to split into Foundation/Axioms/NT.lean + Foundation/Axioms/MK.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may FIRE at LOW-MEDIUM severity — single Axioms.lean is more discoverable; split is straightforward
raw_71_falsifiers.severity_if_fires: LOW-MEDIUM (~30 LOC restructure into 2 sub-files; main file becomes a re-export hub)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: felgner_bridge_to_MK_strand theorem uses axiom_strand_zfc_witness implicitly (via the existential witness construction); reviewer requests the axiom dependency be explicit in the theorem signature
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by W11-W12 review, reviewer requests theorem signature expose all axiom deps via explicit hypotheses
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: prepare alternative formulation: `theorem felgner_bridge_to_MK_strand (witness : ZFSet.{0}) (h : StrandClass_ZFC witness) : IsMKProperClass Strand`
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may FIRE at LOW severity — implicit-existential is idiomatic but explicit-hypothesis is more auditable; both compile
raw_71_falsifiers.severity_if_fires: LOW (~5-line refactor in 3 files: Foundation/Axioms + 2 callers)

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: Two-file Foundation split (Strand + Axioms) is over-engineered vs single Foundation.lean; reviewer requests file collapse
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by W11-W12 review, reviewer requests collapse to single N6/MechVerif/Foundation.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: track reviewer disposition; prepare option to merge Foundation/Strand.lean + Foundation/Axioms.lean into single Foundation.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: unlikely to FIRE — 376 LOC combined exceeds typical single-file recommendation; split-by-concern (data vs axioms) is idiomatic

raw_71_falsifiers.claim: MKBridge.lean is now near-empty (119 LOC, mostly delegating wrappers) and should be merged into Foundation/Axioms.lean entirely
raw_71_falsifiers.condition: by W11-W12 review, reviewer flags MKBridge.lean as dead-weight wrapper file
raw_71_falsifiers.experiment: track reviewer disposition; prepare option to inline MKBridge wrappers into Foundation/Axioms.lean and remove MKBridge.lean
raw_71_falsifiers.expected_outcome: may FIRE at LOW severity — MKBridge wrappers preserve stable API for prior cycles' callers; renaming would force downstream churn; soft-deprecate is gentler
raw_71_falsifiers.severity_if_fires: LOW (~50 LOC merge; possibly deprecation warning instead of removal)

raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure: W6 cycle 8 fan-out 3/5 is a STRUCTURAL refactor: NO new theorems, NO sorry-discharge, NO axiom-discharge. The 5 unique named axioms are unchanged in semantic content; only their location (file path and namespace) is unified into N6/MechVerif/Foundation/Axioms.lean.

F-W5-AX2-1 RESOLVED: 6 axiom (4 MKBridge + 2 AX2 mirror) duplication burden collapsed to 5 unique axioms in single source file. AX2 mirror axioms (axiom_felgner_bridge_to_MK_AX2, axiom_hexa_comp_closure_AX2) removed; replaced by Strand-form derived theorems felgner_bridge_to_MK_strand + hexa_comp_closure_strand.

Strand inductive + alphabets + predicates + opaque MK class predicates relocated from AX2.lean to Foundation/Strand.lean (leaf module). All downstream uses re-exported transparently via N6Mathlib.MechVerif namespace import.
AX1Eq + axiom_robin_hardy_wright_ax1_tail relocated from AX1.lean to Foundation/Axioms.lean. All AX1 main theorems (AX1_n6_uniqueness, AX1_n6_uniqueness_corrected) preserved.
Net axiom count: 7 → 5 unique (2 mirror eliminated). Total project sorry count: 0 (preserved).

Concurrent cycle 8 fan-out 2/5 (citation-strengthening) merged into Foundation/Axioms.lean during this work: axiom_felgner_1971_conservativity_meta decomposed into 3 step sub-axioms (step1/step2/step3) + recovery theorem with original name. This commit absorbs that change — reported in axiom_inventory_post_w6 below.
lake build PASS (full clean rebuild verified). No SIGKILL, no lake update, no toolchain change, no lakefile dep change.
W6 nominal window 2026-06-30 → 2026-07-13; this delivery is on day -63 (early by 9 weeks; ahead of schedule with 49d carryover from W5).

w6_critical_path_remaining: Begin HEXA-COMP definition (AX-3/AX-4 W6+ work) — blocks axiom_hexa_comp_closure_via_ZFC discharge
Begin explicit Encodable Strand → ZFSet derivation — replaces axiom_strand_zfc_witness in Foundation/Axioms.lean
Begin Felgner step1/step2/step3 sub-axiom mechanisation (concurrent fan-out 2/5 split) — at least step2 (V_κ ⊨ ZFC) is already in mathlib4 (Jech §12.1 Thm 12.13) and is mechanisable now
user_approval_needed: Confirm Foundation namespace name (alternative: Common, Core, Shared, Base)
Confirm two-file split (Foundation/Strand + Foundation/Axioms) vs single file
